assets.name: Maneki Cat
assets.reviewNote: Top ears sit close to the deliverables label; crop preserves extra padding without including the green header or lower panel line.

assets.name: Home Background Preview
assets.reviewNote: The deliverables preview is small and rounded; crop excludes the filename label and keeps the visible artwork area.

assets.name: Market Background Preview
assets.reviewNote: The deliverables preview is small and rounded; crop excludes the filename label and keeps the visible artwork area.

assets.name: Progress Bar
assets.reviewNote: Source preview combines the bar and 75% text; crop keeps both because the source does not clearly separate them.

assets.name: Critical Effect
assets.reviewNote: Outer rays fade into the sheet background; crop uses extra padding to avoid clipping faint tips.

assets.name: Boss Cat Preview
assets.reviewNote: Crown and weapon sit near section label text; crop keeps extra top padding while avoiding the label.

assets.name: Planter
assets.reviewNote: Planter is close to the fountain; crop preserves padding without crossing into the fountain bowl.

assets.name: Fountain
assets.reviewNote: Rightmost ornament approaches the shop-card divider; crop keeps extra padding and avoids the divider.
